purpose_context: Three inter-dependent bugs prevent spec-kitty commands from being reliably installed and verified for Claude and other slash-command agents. The template resolver returns None after a doctrine layer migration, the doctor health check is structurally blind to the slash-command pipeline, and the dev repo has no bootstrap path. This mission closes all three root causes with a layered fix: resolver repair, doctor coverage extension, and dev-env bootstrap.
purpose_tldr: Repair the broken global slash command installation pipeline so all configured agents always have the complete canonical command set installed, detectable, and self-healing.
